tweets.text:
Not everyone online is who they say they are. 🚨

Kendall Carter is serving 30 years in federal prison for victimizing more than a dozen teens and children.

His case from @DHSgov’s national public awareness campaign, @Know2Protect, is a powerful reminder: Offenders often use fake profiles to manipulate and exploit kids online.

Help young people spot #FakeProfiles before harm happens using the Tips2Identify Fake Profiles resource at https://t.co/m7m0YvigvJ #K2PAnniversary

tweets.text:
ICE @HSI_HQ Springfield investigated Brayanne Escobar-Guarnizo, of Colombia, with the Green County Sheriff’s Office.

🔎Escobar entered the U.S. illegally in 2023, under the Biden administration, with his wife and two children. He’s currently in removal proceedings, awaiting sentencing for a child exploitation conviction and facing child rape charges.

ICE is prepared to escort him home to Colombia after he faces justice in court.

tweets.text:
🚨MASSIVE HUMAN SMUGGLING ATTEMPT THWARTED🚨

ICE @HSI_HQ, @CBP and local police intercepted a vessel off the coast of Puerto Rico transporting 58 Dominican nationals and 6 Haitian nationals May 9.

All aliens taken into custody during this operation in our U.S. territory have been processed for removal proceedings.

🛑Under @POTUS Donald J. Trump and @SecMullinDHS, our U.S. maritime borders are more secure than ever.

author.description: Protects America through criminal investigations and by enforcing immigration law to preserve national security and public safety.  https://t.co/rDI2IeFofc

tweets.text:
An ICE HSI @HSIKansasCity probe ended with a 50-year sentence for Missouri man Richard James Miller for recording himself sexually abusing children over several years.

One victim said his abuse began when she was 15. The other said she was eight or nine years old.

Both said Miller threatened to kill their relatives, and one said he threatened to make her watch him kill her two dogs.

Details: https://t.co/D3hw0PXWYF 

This case is part of Project Safe Childhood, a nationwide Department of Justice initiative to combat the growing epidemic of child sexual exploitation and abuse. Learn more at https://t.co/XpRN94Mz9o.
tweets.text_resolved:

Details: https://www.ice.gov/news/releases/missouri-man-sentenced-50-years-recording-child-sexual-abuse-after-hsi-st-louis 

This case is part of Project Safe Childhood, a nationwide Department of Justice initiative to combat the growing epidemic of child sexual exploitation and abuse. Learn more at http://www.justice.gov/psc.

tweets.text:
CHILD PREDATOR WANTED🚨

Ricardo Vega is a citizen of Mexico wanted for contacting underage girls online, sending them sexually abusive videos and images, and instructing them to reproduce the explicit material using themselves or their younger siblings. 

He also actively exchanged child sexual abuse photos and videos in several online chat rooms frequented by child predators.

He was last seen in Chicago.

tweets.text:
A California court convicted Bruno Franco Estrada Chacon, of Mexico, of prostitution, child sex abuse and committing lewd acts with a child.

Upon his release from prison, ICE arrested him on the following immigration violations:
⚖️INA § 237(a)(2)(A)(iii): Aggravated felony conviction
⚖️INA § 237(a)(2)(A)(i): Conviction of a crime involving moral turpitude

He’s in ICE custody pending removal proceedings.

➡️Under @POTUS Donald J. Trump and @SecMullinDHS, if you break the law, you will face the consequences. Criminal illegal aliens are not welcome in the U.S.

tweets.text:
Today we honor the legacy of Special Agent Joseph Sitter who was ambushed and killed in 1915 while he and Texas Rangers attempted to capture Francisco "Chico" Cano and his gang.

🎗️ICE remembers you and pledges its continued resolve to ensure public safety and national security.

💻See his story: https://t.co/nDoP5OAtA1

tweets.text:
Missouri CHILD PREDATOR Ryan Edward Hine was sentenced to 30 years without parole for enticing a minor to produce child sex abuse material and advertising it online after an ICE @HSINewark, N.J., and @HSIKansasCity probe.

Hine requested explicit images and videos via text from a 15-year-old girl. Then, he crossed state lines regularly to record himself having sex with the child victim to produce videos of child sexual abuse.

Hine also posed as a minor female to:
➡️Recruit other minors for child sexual abuse material
➡️Advertise CSAM to adult buyers online

Details: https://t.co/MhCw16jHvk 

⚠️Visit https://t.co/CCfnnYKy3m for resources to help your kids and teens protect themselves from online exploitation before they become victims.

tweets.text:
Rene Sanchez, a criminal illegal alien and MS-13 transnational terrorist organization member from Mexico has multiple convictions including:

🚨Assault
🚨Prison contraband smuggling
🚨Property damage
🚨Crimes against a person

He’s also been arrested multiple other times, and ICE removed him in 2023, but he clearly returned.

ICE took him into custody May 15, and he will stay detained pending removal proceedings.

🛑Under @POTUS Trump and @SecMullinDHS, U.S. borders are closed to illegal aliens.

author.description: Protects America through criminal investigations and by enforcing immigration law to preserve national security and public safety.  https://t.co/rDI2IeFofc

tweets.text:
Local law enforcement in California accused Aman Kumar, of India, of striking a 4-year-old boy with his vehicle and fleeing the scene of the accident. The boy is expected to survive but tragically sustained critical injuries.

Due to sanctuary policies, the state released 30-year-old Kumar from jail despite knowing he is an illegal alien facing felony hit-and-run charges.

Kumar is currently in removal proceedings, so ICE had to assemble a larger team and apprehend him in the community because California jails refuse to work with ICE.

🔎Currently, more than 33,000 illegal immigrants in California custody have active detainer requests tied to crimes ranging from homicide and assault to robbery, drug offenses, weapons crimes, and sexual predatory offenses.

tweets.text:
20-year-old illegal alien Angel Emilio Rodriguez-Marroquin, of Guatemala, began a 50-year prison sentence May 18 for producing child sex abuse materials of kids he knew who were as young as eight years old.

ICE Homeland Security Investigations special agents arrested him last November and ICE Enforcement and Removal Operations officers will be there to pick him up from prison if he is ever eventually released.
